paper_title: DistilBERT, a distilled version of BERT: smaller, faster, cheaper and lighter

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a **knowledge distillation** framework combining masked language modeling, distillation loss, and cosine distance loss to train a 40% smaller BERT model retaining 97% of its performance while being 60% faster.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Concatenation of English Wikipedia and Toronto Book Corpus
raw_extraction.application: On-device computation, mobile applications, efficient inference on resource-constrained devices, natural language understanding tasks (e.g., sentiment analysis, question answering).
raw_extraction.research_problem: Reducing computational cost and memory requirements of large pre-trained language models while preserving performance for on-device deployment and constrained environments.
raw_extraction.extension: Student model initialized from teacher weights by taking every other layer, combined with a **triple loss** (MLM + distillation + cosine embedding loss).
